news.title: From Canton Fair to Yiwu Expo: Fastener Industry Embraces "Dual-Core" Trade Boom in April
news.summary: April 2026 marks a concentrated爆发 of fastener trade events in South China. The 6th Guangzhou Sourcing Fair (GSF) will be held at the Poly World Trade Center from April 14-17, followed immediately by the 10th Yiwu International Hardware & Electrical Appliances Expo from April 20-22. The linkage between these two major commercial hubs creates a "Guangzhou precision对接 + Yiwu global reach" dual-core trade corridor, offering fastener enterprises a prime window to secure overseas orders and expand into emerging markets.

news.title: U.S. Tariff Policy Adjustment: Fastener Exports Face a New Turning Point
news.summary: Effective April 6, 2026, the U.S. has officially adjusted Section 232 tariff rules for steel and aluminum derivative products. For fasteners containing steel or aluminum, the calculation method has fundamentally changed—from taxing only the metal content value to levying a 25% tariff on the total declared value of the entire product. This article provides an in-depth analysis of the new regulations, cost impact estimates, and corporate response strategies.

items.title: Hex Bolts
items.summary: Full and partial thread hex bolts in DIN 931/933, ISO 4014/4017. Grades 4.8 to 12.9, sizes M4–M64.

items.title: Flange Bolts
items.summary: Serrated and non-serrated flange bolts per DIN 6921 / ISO 1665. Built-in washer face for vibration resistance.

items.title: Anchor Bolts
items.summary: Expansion anchors, wedge anchors, and chemical anchor bolts for concrete and masonry.

items.title: High Strength Bolts
items.summary: High strength structural bolts for heavy-duty applications. Grade 8.8, 10.9, 12.9 available.

items.title: T Bolts
items.summary: T-shaped bolts for T-slot profiles and structural applications. Various sizes and materials.

items.title: Hex Nuts
items.summary: Standard hex nuts per DIN 934 / ISO 4032. Sizes M4–M64, grades 4, 6, 8, 10.

items.title: Flange Nuts
items.summary: Serrated flange nuts with built-in washer face for vibration resistance. DIN 6923.

items.title: Nyloc Nuts
items.summary: Nylon insert lock nuts for prevailing torque resistance. DIN 985 / ISO 10511.

items.title: Weld Nuts
items.summary: Projection weld nuts for automated welding. Square and hexagonal types available.

items.title: Wing Nuts
items.summary: Hand-operated wing nuts for quick assembly and disassembly. Various sizes.

items.title: Flat Washers
items.summary: Standard flat washers per DIN 125 / ISO 7089. Zinc plated, galvanized, or plain finish.

items.title: Lock Washers
items.summary: Split lock washers for vibration resistance. DIN 127 / ISO 7092.

items.title: Spring Washers
items.summary: Conical spring washers for dynamic load applications. DIN 2093.

items.title: Square Washers
items.summary: Square flat washers for structural applications. DIN 436.

items.title: Machine Screws
items.summary: Pan head, hex head, and countersunk machine screws. DIN 963, 964, 965, 966.

items.title: Self Drilling Screws
items.summary: Tek screws with drill point for metal and steel applications. Various head types.

items.title: Wood Screws
items.summary: Flat head and round head wood screws. Various sizes and materials.

items.title: Drywall Screws
items.summary: Fine and coarse thread drywall screws for gypsum board applications.

items.title: Threaded Rods
items.summary: Full thread and partially threaded rods. DIN 975, M4–M30, various lengths.

items.title: Double End Studs
items.summary: Stud bolts with threads on both ends. For flanges, valve fittings, and pipe systems.

items.title: Cotter Pins
items.summary: Standard cotter pins for secure fastening. DIN 94 / ISO 1234.

items.title: Dowel Pins
items.summary: Parallel pins for precise alignment. DIN 7 / ISO 2338, hardened steel.

items.title: Wedge Anchors
items.summary: Zinc-plated wedge anchors for concrete and masonry. Heavy-duty applications.

items.title: Expansion Bolts
items.summary: Expansion anchors for secure anchoring in concrete, brick, and stone.

items.title: Drop-in Anchors
items.summary: Drop-in anchors for use with threaded rods and concrete applications.

items.title: Solid Rivets
items.summary: Solid rivets for permanent fastening. Various head types and materials.

items.title: Blind Rivets
items.summary: Pop rivets for applications where access is limited to one side.

items.title: Semi-tubular Rivets
items.summary: Semi-tubular rivets with partial hole for clinching applications.

items.title: U Bolts
items.summary: U-bolts for pipe and tube mounting. Various sizes and materials.

items.title: External Circlips
items.summary: External retaining rings for shaft applications. DIN 471.

items.title: Fastener Kits
items.summary: Assorted fastener kits for repair and maintenance. Custom packaging available.
